name: #442 · cf1843c06973bf3164b1cd87bcb61cb27ab7ef02 · Michał Kruk · refactor(agents): consolidate 14 agents to 8, apply Anthropic skill-building principles

newTests.name: Unit tests for init-agents scaffold selection > clojure-test flavour > uses clojure-test writer template

Unit tests for init-agents scaffold selection > --only orchestrator > includes orchestrator

Unit tests for init-agents scaffold selection > all agents (no --only) > includes orchestrator agent
Unit tests for init-agents scaffold selection > --only core > excludes non-core agents
